id.description: The unique identifier for the fine-tuning job.

auto_start.description: Whether the job was configured to auto-start.

status.description: The current status of the fine-tuning job.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp when the job was created.

modified_at.description: Unix timestamp when the job was last modified.

training_files.description: The training files used for this job.

validation_files.description: The validation files used for this job.

fine_tuned_model.description: The ID of the fine-tuned model, available after successful completion.

integrations.description: The integrations enabled for this job.
